summary: Dashboard Navigable KPIs and Allarmi Critici Testing Complete - All 20/20 frontend tests PASSED. Dashboard shows 'Allarmi Critici' section at top with red border/header when anomalies exist. All KPIs are clickable and navigate to filtered views correctly. Filter dropdowns are pre-selected when navigating from Dashboard.

alarm_click_navigation.pagamenti_pending_alarm: PASS - Navigates to Payments with filter=pending
alarm_click_navigation.giornate_open_alarm: PASS - Navigates to Matchdays with filter=OPEN

kpi_click_navigation.leagues_a_rischio_click: PASS - Navigates to Leagues with filter=all

verified_features: Dashboard shows 'Allarmi Critici' section at top with red border (#EF4444) when anomalies exist
Allarmi Critici lists: leghe senza owner, leghe senza admin, pagamenti pending, giornate OPEN
Clicking 'leghe senza owner' alarm navigates to Leagues with 'Senza Owner' (no_owner) filter pre-selected
Clicking 'leghe senza admin' alarm navigates to Leagues with 'Senza Admin' (no_admin) filter pre-selected
Clicking 'pagamenti pending' alarm navigates to Payments with 'Pending' filter pre-selected
Clicking 'giornate OPEN' alarm navigates to Matchdays with 'OPEN' status filter pre-selected
Users KPI 'Attivi' click navigates to Users page
Users KPI 'Disabilitati' click navigates to Users with __disabled__ filter
Leagues 'A Rischio' KPI click navigates to Leagues with 'all' risk filter
Matchday status counters (Bozza/Open/Locked/Live/Completate) each navigate to Matchdays with correct status filter
Payments 'Pending' counter click navigates to Payments with pending filter
Matchdays page has status filter dropdown (md-status-filter)
Leagues page has search bar (league-search-input) and risk filter dropdown (league-risk-filter)
Payments page has status filter (pay-status-filter) with Tutti/Pending/Pagati options
critical_code_review_comments: navigateWith() function correctly sets navFilter global object before calling navigate()
Each page render function (render_matchdays, render_leagues, render_payments, render_users) correctly consumes navFilter and resets it
Alarm onclick handlers use correct filter values: no_owner, no_admin, pending, OPEN, LIVE
KPI counter boxes have cursor:pointer style and correct onclick handlers
Filter dropdowns have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard navigation complete. All KPIs clickable with correct filter navigation. Allarmi Critici shows 4 active anomalies: 1 leghe senza owner (Lega Nazionale FantaPronostic), 7 leghe senza admin, 12 pagamenti pending, 1 giornate OPEN. Each alarm navigates to correct page with filter pre-selected. Filter dropdowns have proper data-testid attributes.
